profile.title: Ph.D. Student
profile.department: School of Computer Science and Technology
profile.bio:
Hi there! I am Yixuan Du (杜奕轩), a second-year Ph.D. student at the School of Computer Science and Technology, Tianjin University, advised by Prof. Di Jin. Before that, I received my B.E. degree from Jilin University in 2024.

My research interest lies in Graph Machine Learning, with a focus on graph neural networks, graph foundation models, and their applications to real-world problems such as text-attributed graphs and multimodal graphs. Beyond my main research line, I also maintain a broad interest in various topics across artificial intelligence.

I am always open to collaboration — feel free to reach out via email.

news.content: ✨ One paper on Graph Neural Networks was accepted by WWW 2026.
✨ One co-authored paper was accepted by AAAI 2026 as an Oral presentation.
🎓 Started my Ph.D. journey at Tianjin University.
🎉 Graduated from Jilin University with a B.E. degree.
